## Summary

Briefly describe what this PR changes and why.

## Type of Change

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor
- [ ] Docs
- [ ] Build/CI

## Validation

Describe how you tested this change.

- [ ] App starts (`python desktop/main.py`)
- [ ] Relevant flow tested manually
- [ ] Docs updated (if needed)

## Screenshots / Recordings

For UI changes, include visuals.

## Checklist

- [ ] Code is focused and minimal
- [ ] No unrelated changes
- [ ] Ready for review
